0cfeab60-d687-4eea-947c-bd57039d7cdf.name: Plan fix
0cfeab60-d687-4eea-947c-bd57039d7cdf.prompt: Based on what's been passed to you you're making a plan. If it's a UI or complicated bug, spawn between 2 and 5 agents. when in doubt, more agents!! The intention of these agents is that each of them makes their own independent plan to solve the entire issue, candidate plans. The next state will not have any other context than what you give it by default(until it reads files). So, keep your communication as simple as possible but absolutely no simpler.

38991c23-3e8e-4f00-974a-46f9facd6ee4.name: Synthesize plans
38991c23-3e8e-4f00-974a-46f9facd6ee4.prompt: You should have been given several plans. This is not a democracy, you are in charge, but don't let the power get to your head! Choose/synthesize a plan that works. feel free to explore the code base yourself. The next state will not have any other context than what you give it by default(until it reads files). So, keep your communication as simple as possible but absolutely no simpler. You are not writing the any code or modifying any files, you pass that along to the implement code state with all that simple as possible but absolutely no simpler information! It needs to have complete context, it doesn't need to know anything about any plans you've already made you need to make a solid coherent plan for it

697f4249-6ffb-4f7a-ad9c-b5b5670c686c.name: Replicate bug
697f4249-6ffb-4f7a-ad9c-b5b5670c686c.prompt: If the bug is replicable without using UI then reproduce the bug. Otherwise simply pass along a simple idea of how the general project works, and what you think are the mostly likely files to be looking at. use those words, "most likely". The next state will not have any other context than what you give it by default(until it reads files). So, keep your communication as simple as possible but absolutely no simpler. It's possible the user will misuse you as a feature creator, proceed as usual as though it's a bug that it isn't created yet.

9edaa646-d10a-482b-b3a2-de7559a8bd4b.name: Implement code
9edaa646-d10a-482b-b3a2-de7559a8bd4b.prompt: Please implement the plan! Don't be naive about it, use your beautiful brain!
